items.name: Jebena Medium Roast
items.description: Jebena Medium Roast coffee is a blend made with 100% Specialty Arabica beans, carefully selected and roasted to bring out the best in the beans. The medium roast gives this coffee a smooth, balanced flavor that is perfect for everyday drinking. But what sets the Jebena apart is its sweet finish.
items.simplified_description: A smooth and balanced coffee made from high-quality Arabica beans, perfect for daily enjoyment.

items.name: Fernelo Dark Roast
items.description: Our Fernelo Dark Roast coffee is a delicious blend made with 100% Specialty Arabica beans, carefully selected and roasted to perfection to bring out its rich, full-bodied flavor. The dark roast gives this coffee a bold, robust taste that is sure to satisfy even the most discerning coffee connoisseur. Fernelo Dark Roast has a unique citric undertone that sets it apart from other dark roasts.
items.simplified_description: A bold and rich coffee made from high-quality Arabica beans, with a unique citrus flavor.
